name: HMCS Frontenac (K 335)
events: 28 Aug 1944 HMS Upright (Lt. J.A.L. Wilkinson, RN) conducted A/S exercises off St.Johns with ships of Escort Group C 1, the frigate HMCS New Glasgow (T/Cdr. G.S. Hall, RCNR) and the corvettes HMCS Arnprior (T/Lt. S.D. Thom, DSC, RCNVR), HMCS Frontenac (T/Lt. M.C. Bull, RCNVR), HMCS Giffard (T/Lt. G.H. Matheson, RCNR) and HMCS Fredericton (T/Lt. J.C. Smyth, RCNR). It is possible the frigate HMCS Joliette (T/A/Lt.Cdr. G.N. Downey, RCNR) and / or the corvette HMCS Chambly (T/Lt. S.D. Taylor, RCNR) also participated. (1)

17 Dec 1944 HMS Vengeful (Lt. A.S. Melville-Ross, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Larne with HMCS Arnprior (T/Lt. S.D. Thom, DSC, RCNVR), HMCS Frontenac (T/Lt. M.C. Bull, RCNVR) and HMCS Orangeville (Lt. F.R. Pike, RCNVR). (2)
1 May 1945 HMS Unruffled (T/Lt. A.H. MacCoy, DSC, SANF(V)) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda together with HMCS Frontenac (T/Lt. D.R. Baker, RCNVR). (3)
3 May 1945 HMS Unruffled (T/Lt. A.H. MacCoy, DSC, SANF(V)) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda together with HMCS Frontenac (T/Lt. D.R. Baker, RCNVR). (3)
